Property.Name: BodyScript
HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE PROCEDURE [Application].[Configuration_ApplyPartitionedColumnstoreIndexing] WITH EXECUTE AS OWNER AS

Property.Name: BodyScript
BodyScript
BodyScript
HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE PROCEDURE [Application].[Configuration_PopulateLargeSaleTable] @EstimatedRowsFor2012 bigint = 12000000 WITH EXECUTE AS OWNER AS

Property.Name: BodyScript
HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE PROCEDURE [Application].Configuration_ReseedETL WITH EXECUTE AS OWNER AS

Property.Name: BodyScript
Property.Value: SELECT @Date AS [Date], DAY(@Date) AS [Day Number], CAST(DATENAME(day, @Date) AS nvarchar(10)) AS [Day], CAST(DATENAME(month, @Date) AS nvarchar(10)) AS [Month], CAST(SUBSTRING(DATENAME(month, @Date), 1, 3) AS nvarchar(3)) AS [Short Month], MONTH(@Date) AS [Calendar Month Number], CAST(N'CY' + CAST(YEAR(@Date) AS nvarchar(4)) + N'-' + SUBSTRING(DATENAME(month, @Date), 1, 3) AS nvarchar(10)) AS [Calendar Month Label], YEAR(@Date) AS [Calendar Year], CAST(N'CY' + CAST(YEAR(@Date) AS nvarchar(4)) AS nvarchar(10)) AS [Calendar Year Label], CASE WHEN MONTH(@Date) IN (11, 12) THEN MONTH(@Date) - 10 ELSE MONTH(@Date) + 2 END AS [Fiscal Month Number], CAST(N'FY' + CAST(CASE WHEN MONTH(@Date) IN (11, 12) THEN YEAR(@Date) + 1 ELSE YEAR(@Date) END AS nvarchar(4)) + N'-' + SUBSTRING(DATENAME(month, @Date), 1, 3) AS nvarchar(20)) AS [Fiscal Month Label], CASE WHEN MONTH(@Date) IN (11, 12) THEN YEAR(@Date) + 1 ELSE YEAR(@Date) END AS [Fiscal Year], CAST(N'FY' + CAST(CASE WHEN MONTH(@Date) IN (11, 12) THEN YEAR(@Date) + 1 ELSE YEAR(@Date) END AS nvarchar(4)) AS nvarchar(10)) AS [Fiscal Year Label], DATEPART(ISO_WEEK, @Date) AS [ISO Week Number]

Property.Name: HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE FUNCTION Integration.GenerateDateDimensionColumns(@Date date) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN

Property.Name: BodyScript
HeaderContents
Property.Value: CREATE PROCEDURE Integration.GetLastETLCutoffTime @TableName sysname WITH EXECUTE AS OWNER AS

Property.Value: CREATE PROCEDURE Integration.PopulateDateDimensionForYear @YearNumber int WITH EXECUTE AS OWNER AS

Property.Name: BodyScript
BodyScript
HeaderContents
Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Numeric ID used for reference to a city within the WWI database'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Numeric ID used for reference to a customer within the WWI database'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for date dimension (actual date is used for key)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Name that this person prefers to be called'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for the payment method dimension'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Numeric ID for the payment method in the WWI database'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Brand for the stock item (if the item is branded)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Usual package for selling outers of this stock item (ie cartons, boxes, etc.)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Does this stock item need to be in a chiller?'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Number of days typically taken from order to receipt of this stock item'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Quantity of the stock item in an outer package'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Recommended retail price for this stock item'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Usual package for selling units of this stock item'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Full name of a stock item (but not a full description)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for the stock item dimension'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Typical weight for one unit of this product (packaged)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Selling price (ex-tax) for one unit of this product'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Numeric ID used for reference to a stock item within the WWI database'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Number of days for payment of an invoice (ie payment terms)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Supplier reference for our organization (might be our account number at the supplier)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Numeric ID used for reference to a supplier within the WWI database'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for the transaction type dimension'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Numeric ID used for reference to a transaction type within the WWI database'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for a row in the Movement fact'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Quantity of stock movement (positive is incoming stock, negative is outgoing)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Stock item transaction ID in source system'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Description of the item supplied (Usually the stock item name but can be overridden)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for a row in the Order fact'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for a row in the Purchase fact'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Description of the item supplied (Usually the stock item name but can be overridden)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for a row in the Sale fact'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Bin location (where is this stock in the warehouse)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Unit cost when the stock item was last purchased'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Quantity below which reordering should take place'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for a row in the Stock Holding fact'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Lineage Key for the data load for this row'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'DW key for a row in the Transaction fact'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Numeric ID used for reference to a city within the WWI database'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Time up to which data has been loaded'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Time when the data load attempt completed (successfully or not)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Time when the data load attempt began'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Time that rows from the source system were loaded up until'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Name of the table for this data load event'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: 'Allows quickly locating by WWI City Key'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: N'Views and stored procedures that provide the only access for the Power BI dashboard system'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: N'Views and stored procedures that provide the only access for the reporting system'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: N'Holds sequences used by all tables in the application'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: N'Views and stored procedures that provide the only access for the application website'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: N'Movement fact table (movements of stock items)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: N'Purchase fact table (stock purchases from suppliers)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: N'Sale fact table (invoiced sales to customers)'

Property.Name: Value
Property.Value: N'Transaction fact table (financial transactions involving customers and supppliers)'
